policy_statement: Implement the Territorial Climate Energy Plan (PCET) / Dakar Climate Action Plan structured around strategic axes and operational adaptation and mitigation actions for 2021–2025 and longer-term horizons.
verbatim_text:
Dakar's Climate Action Plan is structured into 7 strategic axes with 22 adaptation and mitigation actions that integrate the themes of 'climate, energy, urban planning, risk and disaster management, living environment.

## 9.3  Operational Adaptation and Mitigation Action Plan
section_header: Territorial Climate Energy Plan of Dakar 2021-2025 / 9.3 Operational Adaptation and Mitigation Action Plan
extraction_rationale: This is the umbrella plan/program (PCET) explicitly presented as structured into strategic axes with multiple listed actions underneath, meeting the 'parent' criteria.

policy_statement: Adopt energy efficiency standards (building code) to improve the energy performance of new buildings.
verbatim_text:
|   # | Actions                                                                                                    |
|-----|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|  10 | Adoption of energy efficiency standards (building code) to improve the energy performance of new buildings |
parent_policy_name: Territorial Climate Energy Plan (PCET) / Operational Adaptation and Mitigation Action Plan
extraction_rationale: Numbered action (#10) in the PCET operational action list; a specific intervention (standards/building code).

policy_statement: Realise energy savings in buildings in the City of Dakar.
parent_policy_name: Territorial Climate Energy Plan (PCET) / Operational Adaptation and Mitigation Action Plan
extraction_rationale: Numbered action (#11) in the PCET operational action list; specific intervention focused on building energy savings.

policy_statement: Implement widespread use of solar LED lamps in public lighting.
parent_policy_name: Territorial Climate Energy Plan (PCET) / Operational Adaptation and Mitigation Action Plan
extraction_rationale: Numbered action (#12) in the PCET operational action list; concrete technology deployment (solar/LED public lighting).

policy_statement: Reduce Dakar’s GHG emissions by 54% by 2050.
verbatim_text:
Overall, the goals that the city could achieve are:

-    a  54%  reduction  in  GHG  emissions  by 2050;
extraction_rationale: Quantified mitigation target with a deadline (2050).

policy_statement: Reduce the energy bill in the built heritage of the City of Dakar by 75% by 2050.
verbatim_text:
Overall, the goals that the city could achieve are:

-  a 75% reduction in the energy bill in the built heritage of the City of Dakar by 2050;
extraction_rationale: Quantified target with deadline focused on municipal/built heritage energy costs.

policy_statement: Increase the share of renewable energy in Dakar’s energy mix to at least 65% by 2050.
verbatim_text:
Overall, the goals that the city could achieve are:

-    an  increase  in  the  share  of  renewable energy in the energy mix of at least 65% by 2050.
extraction_rationale: Quantified renewable energy share target with a deadline (2050).
